title: diasperus perpusillus
side_effects: Diasperus perpusillus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, which can lead to dehydration and electrolyte imbalances. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue due to the plant's high concentration of alkaloids. In rare cases, improper use of diasperus perpusillus can also lead to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
